compiled_state.title: Update test-recipe-executor.sh: add generative recipe rollback test case
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Update tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh (created in story 5108-39a1) to add a test case for generative recipe rollback behavior. This test must fail (RED-like state) until T-SR-06 implements generative rollback in recipe-executor.sh.

### New test to add:
test_generative_recipe_rollback: 
- Create a test registry entry with recipe_type=generative
- Set up a fake generative adapter that creates 2 files then exits non-zero (failure)
- Invoke recipe-executor.sh
- Assert: the 2 files created by the fake adapter are DELETED by the executor on failure (not stash-popped)
- Assert: the working directory is clean after executor exits

This verifies the executor's generative rollback path: when recipe_type=generative, the executor tracks files created during execution and deletes them on failure.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test-recipe-executor.sh contains test_generative_recipe_rollback function
  Verify: grep -q 'generative.*rollback\|rollback.*generative\|test_generative' tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh
- [ ] Test fails before recipe-executor.sh implements generative rollback
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-recipe-executor.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL\|not.*found' || true
